data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SOLVER_DESC
data.value: dekhen ki kya aap samay par ganiteey sameekaran hal kar sakate hain

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SNAKER_DELAY_DESC
data.value: agala lekhan karane se pahale kitane mileesekand tak prateeksha karanee hogee?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_DESC
data.value: dekhen ki kya aap samay par koee kunjee daba sakate hain

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SPEEDPRESS_NOTONTIME
data.value: charitr samay par dabaaya nahin gaya.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SPEEDPRESS_CORRECT
data.value: aapane sahee charitr ko dabaaya hai!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SPEEDPRESS_ESC
data.value: baahar nikalane ke lie aisch dabaen.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MINREDCOLOR_DESC
data.value: nyoonatam laal rang star. nyoonatam sveekrt maan 0 hai aur adhikatam sveekrt maan 255 hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MINGREENCOLOR_DESC
data.value: nyoonatam hara rang star. nyoonatam sveekrt maan 0 hai aur adhikatam sveekrt maan 255 hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MINBLUECOLOR_DESC
data.value: nyoonatam neela rang star. nyoonatam sveekrt maan 0 hai aur adhikatam sveekrt maan 255 hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MINCOLOR_DESC
data.value: nyoonatam rang star. nyoonatam sveekrt maan 0 hai aur adhikatam sveekrt maan 255 rangon ke lie 255 ya 16 rangon ke lie 16 hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MAXREDCOLOR_DESC
data.value: adhikatam laal rang star. nyoonatam sveekrt maan 0 hai aur adhikatam sveekrt maan 255 hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MAXGREENCOLOR_DESC
data.value: adhikatam hara rang star. nyoonatam sveekrt maan 0 hai aur adhikatam sveekrt maan 255 hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MAXBLUECOLOR_DESC
data.value: adhikatam neela rang star. nyoonatam sveekrt maan 0 hai aur adhikatam sveekrt maan 255 hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SOLVER_SHOWINPUT_DESC
data.value: inaput prompt mein jo likha hai use dikhaana hai ya nahin.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SOLVER_MININUM_DESC
data.value: chunane ke lie nyoonatam sankhya kya hai?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SOLVER_MAXINUM_DESC
data.value: chunane ke lie adhikatam sankhya kya hai?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SNAKER_TRUECOLORS_DESC
data.value: asalee rang samarthan ko sakriy karata hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SPEEDPRESS_TIMEOUT_DESC
data.value: kitane mileesekand samayabaahy se pahale keepres ke lie prateeksha karane ke lie? (kastam kathinaee mein)

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SNAKER_STAGEDELAY_DESC
data.value: agale charan ko aarekhit karane se pahale kitane mileesekand prateeksha karen?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_SWITCH_E_DESC
data.value: aasaan kathinaee mein khel shuroo karata hai

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_SWITCH_M_DESC
data.value: madhyam kathinaee mein khel shuroo karata hai

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_SWITCH_H_DESC
data.value: kathin kathinaee mein khel shuroo karata hai

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_SWITCH_V_DESC
data.value: bahut kathin kathinaee mein khel shuroo karata hai

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_SWITCH_C_DESC
data.value: kastam kathinaee mein khel shuroo karata hai. krpaya dhyaan den ki mileesekand mein kastam taimaut tark ke roop mein likha jaana chaahie.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_QUOTE_TEXTLOCATION_DESC
data.value: apane pasandeeda pragati tekst sthaan ka chayan karen.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SOLVER_NEEDSNUM
data.value: aap keval sankhyaen likh sakate hain.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_METEOR_DESC
data.value: aap ek antariksh yaan hain aur ulkaen aapako nasht karane ke lie aa rahee hain. kya aap ise bacha sakate hain?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SHIPS_USEPOWERLINE_DESC
data.value: spesaship ko rendar karane ke lie povaralain ka istemaal karana hai ya kairektar se bade staindard ka istemaal karana hai. yadi aap ulka ke saath powairlinai ka upayog karana chaahate hain, to aapako powairlinai samarthan ke saath ek upayukt font sthaapit karane kee aavashyakata hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SHIPS_METEORSPEED_DESC
data.value: mileesekand mein khel kee gati nirdisht karata hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_BACKRACE_DESC
data.value: kya aap galat ghode ka samarthan karate hain?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_HANGMAN_SWITCH_HARDCORE_DESC
data.value: ek galat akshar aur aapako phaansee par lataka diya jaega!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_HANGMAN_SWITCH_PRACTICE_DESC
data.value: ek yaadrchchhik akshar phenkakar apane haingamain kaushal ka pareekshan karen.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_METERORDODGE_DESC
data.value: aap ek antariksh yaan hain aur ulkaapind aapako nasht karane aa rahe hain. kya aap unhen chakama de sakate hain?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SHIPDUET_DESC
data.value: do antariksh yaan ek doosare ke saath ladaee par hain. ek shot aur antariksh yaan ud jaega. yah ek sthaaneey do-khilaadee khel hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_WORDLE_SWITCH_ORIG_DESC
data.value: mool roop se vardal gem khelen

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_BACKRACE_KEYBINDINGS
data.value: [aintair] daud shuroo karen | [aisch] baahar nikalen | [up/down] chayan ko aage badhaen

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_ROULETTE_UNLUCKY
data.value: lekin, aap badakismat hain. haare hue.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_WORDLE_WIN
data.value: aapane sahee shabd ka anumaan lagaaya! aap jeet gae!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_QUOTE_DESC
data.value: aapako achchhe prasiddh uddharan dikhaata hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SPEEDPRESS_DIFFICULTY_DESC
data.value: apanee pasandeeda kathinaee chunen, jahaan 0 aasaan hai, 1 madhyam hai, 2 kathin hai, 3 bahut kathin hai, aur 4 kastam hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SHIPS_SHIPDUETUSEPOWERLINE_DESC
data.value: spesaship ko rendar karane ke lie paavaralain ka upayog karen ya maanak gretar dain kairektar ka upayog karen. yadi aap shipadyooet ke saath paavaralain ka upayog karana chaahate hain, to aapako paavaralain samarthan ke saath ek upayukt font sthaapit karana hoga.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SWITCH_COMMON_DESC
data.value: saamaany shabd soochee ka upayog karata hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SWITCH_UNCOMMON_DESC
data.value: poorn shabd soochee ka upayog karata hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_EXCEPTION_ENTRIESFAILED
data.value: setings pravishtiyaan praapt karane mein viphal.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_COLOR_DESC
data.value: yah aapako rangon ko konfigar karane kee anumati deta hai

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SOLVER_DESC
data.value: yah anubhaag aapako solvar ko konfigar karane deta hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SPEEDPRESS_DESC
data.value: yah anubhaag aapako speedapres ko konfigar karane deta hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SHIPS_DESC
data.value: yah anubhaag aapako metiyor aur shipadyooet ko konfigar karane deta hai.

data.name: NKS_SCREENSAVERPACKS_COMMON_SETTINGS_MAXCOLOR_DESC
data.value: adhikatam rang star. nyoonatam sveekrt maan 0 hai aur adhikatam sveekrt maan 255 rangon ke lie 255 ya 16 rangon ke lie 16 hai.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SHIPS_USEPOWERLINE_NAME
data.value: spaceship render karne ke liye powerline ka istemaal karen

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SHIPS_SHIPDUETUSEPOWERLINE_NAME
data.value: shipadut mein spaceship render karne ke liye powerline ka istemaal karen
